---
title: "Syphilis Progression Model"
description: "Models multi-stage syphilis transmission, progression, diagnosis, and treatment with stage-dependent infectiousness and screening-driven recovery."
author: "Samuel M. Jenness"
date: "2018-11-01"
categories: [multi-stage, syphilis, diagnosis, treatment, advanced]
order: 9
execute:
  eval: false
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Under Construction
This example is being converted to an annotated Quarto document. In the meantime, you can download and run the standalone scripts:

- [model.R](model.R)
- [module-fx.R](module-fx.R)
:::
